name: Elite Prediction Engine

excluded.reason: Pre-match pressure adds no value; in-play only signal.
Team context hurts UEFA (−1.9pp). Only is_home positive.
General xG blend hurts FGT. Market-specific xG kept as reference only.
Full blends plateau or degrade vs focused feature families.

wiring: Parallel component execution → per-market fusion → unified confidence → JSONL shadow store
production_boundary: No changes to PredictPipeline, WDE, or live API
